'''ân-w-z''' ('''nawaza''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impetrate|impetrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-w-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impetrate|impetrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-w-z
|-
! Lemma
| nawaza
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nawazithi|nawazithi]] || [[word:nawaziji|nawaziji]] || [[word:nawazishi|nawazishi]] || [[word:nawazi|nawazi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nawazuthuth|nawazuthuth]] || [[word:nawazujuj|nawazujuj]] || [[word:nawazushush|nawazushush]] || [[word:nawaz|nawaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nawazuthu|nawazuthu]] || [[word:nawazuju|nawazuju]] || [[word:nawazushu|nawazushu]] || [[word:nawazu|nawazu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nawazufuth|nawazufuth]] || [[word:nawazufuj|nawazufuj]] || [[word:nawazufush|nawazufush]] || [[word:nawazuf|nawazuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nawazethe|nawazethe]] || [[word:nawazeje|nawazeje]] || [[word:nawazeshe|nawazeshe]] || [[word:nawaze|nawaze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nawazothoth|nawazothoth]] || [[word:nawazojoj|nawazojoj]] || [[word:nawazoshosh|nawazoshosh]] || [[word:nawaz|nawaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nawazotho|nawazotho]] || [[word:nawazojo|nawazojo]] || [[word:nawazosho|nawazosho]] || [[word:nawazo|nawazo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nawazofoth|nawazofoth]] || [[word:nawazofoj|nawazofoj]] || [[word:nawazofosh|nawazofosh]] || [[word:nawazof|nawazof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nawazĂŠthĂŠ|nawazĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nawazĂŠjĂŠ|nawazĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nawazĂŠshĂŠ|nawazĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nawazĂŠ|nawazĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nawazathath|nawazathath]] || [[word:nawazajaj|nawazajaj]] || [[word:nawazashash|nawazashash]] || [[word:nawaz|nawaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nawazatha|nawazatha]] || [[word:nawazaja|nawazaja]] || [[word:nawazasha|nawazasha]] || [[word:nawaza|nawaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nawazafath|nawazafath]] || [[word:nawazafaj|nawazafaj]] || [[word:nawazafash|nawazafash]] || [[word:nawazaf|nawazaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nawazasha|nawazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonawazasha|gonawazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinawazasha|gokinawazasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nawaznĂŒsha|nawaznĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonawaznknĂŒsha|gonawaznknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinawaznĂŒsha|gokinawaznĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nawazshĂ«sha|nawazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonawaznkshĂ«sha|gonawaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinawazshĂ«sha|gokinawazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nawazrosha|nawazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonawaznkrosha|gonawaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinawazrosha|gokinawazrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nawazmusha|nawazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonawaznkmusha|gonawaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinawazmusha|gokinawazmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nawazsherasha|nawazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonawaznksherasha|gonawaznksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinawazsherasha|gokinawazsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nawazngasha|nawazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonawaznkngasha|gonawaznkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinawazngasha|gokinawazngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nawazyasha|nawazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonawaznkyasha|gonawaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinawazyasha|gokinawazyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nawazyamasha|nawazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonawaznkyamasha|gonawaznkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinawazyamasha|gokinawazyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nawaznĂŒshĂ«sha|nawaznĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonawaznknĂŒshĂ«sha|gonawaznknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinawaznĂŒshĂ«sha|gokinawaznĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nawaznĂŒrosha|nawaznĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonawaznknĂŒrosha|gonawaznknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinawaznĂŒrosha|gokinawaznĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nawaznĂŒmusha|nawaznĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonawaznknĂŒmusha|gonawaznknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinawaznĂŒmusha|gokinawaznĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nawazshĂ«nĂŒsha|nawazshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonawaznkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gonawaznkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinawazshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokinawazshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nawazshĂ«rosha|nawazshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonawaznkshĂ«rosha|gonawaznkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinawazshĂ«rosha|gokinawazshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nawazshĂ«musha|nawazshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonawaznkshĂ«musha|gonawaznkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinawazshĂ«musha|gokinawazshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nawazronĂŒsha|nawazronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonawaznkronĂŒsha|gonawaznkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinawazronĂŒsha|gokinawazronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nawazroshĂ«sha|nawazroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonawaznkroshĂ«sha|gonawaznkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinawazroshĂ«sha|gokinawazroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nawazromusha|nawazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonawaznkromusha|gonawaznkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinawazromusha|gokinawazromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nawazmunĂŒsha|nawazmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonawaznkmunĂŒsha|gonawaznkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinawazmunĂŒsha|gokinawazmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nawazmushĂ«sha|nawazmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonawaznkmushĂ«sha|gonawaznkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinawazmushĂ«sha|gokinawazmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nawazmurosha|nawazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonawaznkmurosha|gonawaznkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinawazmurosha|gokinawazmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nawaz|nawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŠwĂŠz|nĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honawaz|honawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:honĂŠwĂŠz|honĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonawaz|hohonawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonĂŠwĂŠz|hohonĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒnawaz|nĂŒnawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŠwĂŠz|nĂŒnĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒnawaz|nĂŒnĂŒnawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒnĂŠwĂŠz|nĂŒnĂŒnĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻnawaz|nĂŻnawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŠwĂŠz|nĂŻnĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻnawaz|nĂŻnĂŻnawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻnĂŠwĂŠz|nĂŻnĂŻnĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunawaz|lunawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lunĂŠwĂŠz|lunĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunawaz|lulunawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunĂŠwĂŠz|lulunĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linawaz|linawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:linĂŠwĂŠz|linĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinawaz|lilinawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinĂŠwĂŠz|lilinĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konawaz|konawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:konĂŠwĂŠz|konĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonawaz|kokonawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonĂŠwĂŠz|kokonĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenawaz|kenawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kenĂŠwĂŠz|kenĂŠwĂŠz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenawaz|kekenawaz]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenĂŠwĂŠz|kekenĂŠwĂŠz]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
